component.name: Proton Drive (Unofficial)
component.summary: Unofficial end-to-end encrypted cloud storage client for Linux

description.p: This is an unofficial, community-developed client for Proton Drive. It keeps your files synchronised between your computer and Proton's encrypted servers. Files are encrypted before they leave your device, so nobody but you can read them.
This application is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Proton AG. Proton Drive is a trademark of Proton AG.
This package provides the sync daemon (protond), a command-line client (proton-drive), and a graphical user interface (proton-gui).
Initial release with sync, CLI, GUI, and system tray support.
